en: [Netherlands Tax Administration - See Chapter 7.1](https://www.belastingdienst.nl/wps/wcm/connect/nl/personeel-en-loon/personeel-en-loon)\nNote: If you are not established in the Netherlands, but you employ people who live or work in the Netherlands, you may have to withhold payroll taxes. In that case you must register as a foreign company with the Netherlands Tax Administration.

The Company is EU-based, employees are not based in the Netherlands and are covered by the home country insurance scheme. We are prepared to provide a copy of the A1 certificate upon request.
